core_skills: Software Development, Data Structures, Algorithms, Object-Oriented Design, Java
skill_match_scores: Software Development:1.0, Data Structures:1.0, Algorithms:1.0, Object-Oriented Design:1.0, Java:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent experience, 4- 6 years of hands-on software development experience, Strong foundation in data structures, algorithms, and object-oriented design, Proven expertise in Java, Scala, and clean architecture principles, Deep understanding of cloud-native architectures, microservices, and 'always-up' systems, Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, GitOps, and container orchestration tools like Argo CD, Excellent communication and collaboration skills, A mindset of curiosity, ownership, and relentless focus on solving real customer problems with high-quality software
preferred_quals: Experience with Campaign Execution systems and Generative AI is a strong plus
core_responsibilities: Develop, and deploy critical components of a new Agentic App, delivering production-grade solutions, Translate high-level product goals into actionable engineering tasks and technical plans, Evaluate and advocate for the right tools, frameworks, and technologies, Write clean, testable, and scalable code; conduct peer reviews and drive best practices in CI/CD, observability, and performance optimization, Collaborate cross-functionally with Product, Design, and Engineering to launch customer-centric features, Communicate effectively with leadership to align on goals and priorities, Act as a technical leader and mentor, fostering growth across the team
job_summary: Adobe is a company focused on changing the world through digital experiences. They are looking for a highly motivated Software Developer Engineer to join the team building a next-generation AI-first marketing application, responsible for developing and deploying critical components, collaborating cross-functionally, and acting as a technical leader.
